//review: Target topology read by reviewer subagents and checklist scripts. This is distinct from .devkit/config.json.review, the local execution profile written by devkit init --review (enabled, guard allowlist, decisionsDir override). backendRoots/frontendRoots = path prefixes per reviewer (frontend reviewers exit early when frontendRoots is empty). trustBoundaries = optional prose describing your client/server split. shortcutTracking = enable the tracked-story rule. accessibility.skipTouchTargets = opt out of the 44px WCAG touch-target check (e.g. a desktop-only app).
